{{Quote|In asking the non-human worlds to ally with you, you are asking us to put ourselves at far greater risk. Everyone knows the Emperor's disdain for non-humans. If an alliance challenged Palpatine's forces, and lost, the Emperor's wrath would be mostly directed at the non-human worlds. He might well destroy us as a lesson to the human Rebels.|Jenssar SoBilles|<ref name="Rebel Dawn">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>}}
'''Jenssar SoBilles''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] resistance fighter and later [[Council]]or on the [[New Republic Provisional Council]].

==Biography==
[[File:Jenssar_SoBilles_signature.jpg|thumb|left|170px|Jenssar SoBilles signature]]
SoBilles was a leader in the [[Duros resistance/Legends|Duros resistance]] against the Empire. While meeting secretly with rebel leaders from [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], he expressed his fear that if resistance groups were to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|unite]] retaliation from the Empire would primarily strike the [[Alien/Legends|non-Human]] species, including Duros. Therefore, despite [[Bria Tharen]] of Corellia passionately arguing that remaining separate was a recipe for disaster, SoBilles and the other leaders declined to join together on this occasion. However, they were later convinced to by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and several resistance groups across the galaxy united against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He later became a member of the [[New Republic Provisional Council]], signing the [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|Declaration of a New Republic]] and ''[[Why Do We Fight the Empire?]]''.
